title: Unmounting a container that is already unmounted is OK
body:
We should not be throwing errors because the operation we wanted to perform is already done. Now, it is definitely strange that a container is actually unmounted, but shows as mounted in the DB - if this reoccurs in a way where we can investigate, it's worth tearing into.

Fixes #4033
